_comment: drizzle-orm lists @electric-sql/pglite as an optional peer. When
packages/db installs pglite for tests, pnpm creates a second
drizzle-orm resolution with the peer bound — which then has
nominally-incompatible private types against the copy apps/web
resolves (web doesn't depend on pglite). packageExtensions below
strips the pglite peer hint, forcing a single drizzle-orm resolution.
overrides:
- @xmldom/xmldom: pin to a patched version. Reaches us via
expo > @expo/cli > @expo/plist; Expo's own bump lags the upstream
advisory window. Used only at build time (Expo CLI runs locally /
in CI to bundle the mobile app, never ships in the runtime worker)
but `pnpm audit --prod` flags it as a prod dep because Expo lists
the CLI as a runtime dep. Override is safe because @xmldom/xmldom
exposes a stable surface and 0.8.13+ is API-compatible with 0.8.x.
- fast-xml-builder: GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9 (high). Reaches us via
@aws-sdk/client-s3 > @aws-sdk/core > @aws-sdk/xml-builder >
fast-xml-parser > fast-xml-builder. Patched in >=1.1.7; AWS SDK
pins an older version transitively. Pin direct. Surface stable
across 1.1.x.
- fast-uri: GHSA-q3j6-qgpj-74h6 (high path-traversal). Reaches us
via @sentry/nextjs > @sentry/webpack-plugin > webpack > schema-
utils > ajv > fast-uri. Patched in >=3.1.1; ajv 8.x bundles an
older fast-uri. Pin direct.
- postcss: GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (moderate XSS in CSS stringify).
Reaches us through Next, Expo, and Tailwind. Pin to patched 8.5.x.
- uuid: GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq (moderate bounds check). Reaches us via
Clerk Expo's Solana/RPC websocket transitive tree. Pin to patched
11.1.x without crossing a major boundary.
- fast-xml-parser: GHSA-gh4j-gqv2-49f6 (moderate XML delimiter
injection). Reaches us via AWS SDK XML builder. Pin to patched 5.x.
